---
title: "John Doe Catching Depth"
author: "Evan Metzger"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---
```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

# ================================================================
# STEP 1: LOAD DATA AND FILTER NON-SWINGS
# ================================================================

catch_depth <- read.csv("pitches_catcher_depth.csv")

john_doe <- catch_depth %>%
filter(catcher_id == "m72dabd74cb0ba7d")

john_doe_non_swing <- john_doe %>%
filter(is_swing == "FALSE")

# ================================================================
# STEP 2: COMPUTE JOHN DOE'S FRAMING SCORE AND OPTIMAL DEPTH
# ================================================================

john_doe_scores <- john_doe_non_swing %>%
filter(!is.na(c_y), !is.na(is_strike), !is.na(expected_strike)) %>%
mutate(
expected_strike = pmin(pmax(expected_strike, 0), 1),
framing_score = case_when(
is_strike == TRUE  ~ (1 - expected_strike),
is_strike == FALSE ~ -expected_strike,
TRUE ~ 0
)
) %>%
filter(c_y >= -7, c_y <= -3)

depth_p05 <- quantile(john_doe_scores$c_y, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
depth_p95 <- quantile(john_doe_scores$c_y, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

john_doe_scores <- john_doe_scores %>%
filter(c_y >= depth_p05, c_y <= depth_p95)

bin_width <- 0.1
john_doe_scores <- john_doe_scores %>%
mutate(depth_bin = round(c_y / bin_width) * bin_width)

john_doe_depth_scores <- john_doe_scores %>%
group_by(depth_bin) %>%
summarise(
mean_score = mean(framing_score, na.rm = TRUE),
n_pitches = n(),
.groups = "drop"
) %>%
filter(n_pitches >= 15)

john_doe_optimal <- john_doe_depth_scores %>%
slice_max(mean_score, with_ties = FALSE)

john_doe_avg_depth <- mean(john_doe_scores$c_y, na.rm = TRUE)

print(paste("John Doe's Optimal Catching Depth (c_y):", round(john_doe_optimal$depth_bin, 2)))
print(paste("John Doe's Average Catching Depth (c_y):", round(john_doe_avg_depth, 2)))

# ================================================================
# STEP 3: VISUALIZE — FRAMING SCORE BY DEPTH
# ================================================================

ggplot(john_doe_depth_scores, aes(x = depth_bin, y = mean_score)) +
geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black", width = 0.08) +
geom_vline(xintercept = john_doe_optimal$depth_bin, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
geom_vline(xintercept = john_doe_avg_depth, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
annotate("text",
x = john_doe_optimal$depth_bin,
y = max(john_doe_depth_scores$mean_score, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05,
label = paste0("Optimal: ", round(john_doe_optimal$depth_bin, 2), " ft"),
color = "red", hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0) +
annotate("text",
x = john_doe_avg_depth,
y = max(john_doe_depth_scores$mean_score, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05,
label = paste0("Average: ", round(john_doe_avg_depth, 2), " ft"),
color = "blue", hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dotted") +
labs(
title = "John Doe: Framing Score by Catcher Depth",
subtitle = "Red = Optimal Depth | Blue = Average Depth",
x = "Catcher Depth (c_y)",
y = "Framing Score"
) +
theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
ylim(0, max(john_doe_depth_scores$mean_score, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15)

# ================================================================
# STEP 4: TABLE — NUMBER OF PITCHES PER DEPTH BIN
# ================================================================

john_doe_bin_table <- john_doe_depth_scores %>%
arrange(desc(mean_score)) %>%
select(depth_bin, n_pitches, mean_score)

print(john_doe_bin_table)

# ================================================================
# STEP 5: STRIKE RATE BY DEPTH (NON-SWINGS ONLY)
# ================================================================

john_doe_strike_rate <- john_doe_non_swing %>%
filter(!is.na(c_y), !is.na(is_strike)) %>%
filter(c_y >= depth_p05, c_y <= depth_p95) %>%
mutate(
depth_bin = floor(c_y / 0.1) * 0.1,
is_strike = as.logical(is_strike)
) %>%
group_by(depth_bin) %>%
summarise(
n_pitches   = n(),
strike_rate = mean(is_strike, na.rm = TRUE),
.groups = "drop"
) %>%
filter(n_pitches >= 15)

avg_strike_rate <- weighted.mean(john_doe_strike_rate$strike_rate,
john_doe_strike_rate$n_pitches,
na.rm = TRUE)

print(john_doe_strike_rate)

ggplot(john_doe_strike_rate, aes(x = depth_bin, y = strike_rate)) +
geom_col(fill = "darkorange", color = "black", width = 0.08) +
geom_hline(yintercept = avg_strike_rate, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
annotate("text",
x = min(john_doe_strike_rate$depth_bin),
y = avg_strike_rate + 0.01,
label = paste0("Avg Strike Rate = ", scales::percent(avg_strike_rate, accuracy = 0.1)),
hjust = 0, color = "black", size = 4.5) +
geom_vline(xintercept = john_doe_optimal$depth_bin, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
geom_vline(xintercept = john_doe_avg_depth, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
annotate("text",
x = john_doe_optimal$depth_bin,
y = max(john_doe_strike_rate$strike_rate, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05,
label = paste0("Optimal: ", round(john_doe_optimal$depth_bin, 2), " ft"),
color = "red", hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0) +
annotate("text",
x = john_doe_avg_depth,
y = max(john_doe_strike_rate$strike_rate, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05,
label = paste0("Average: ", round(john_doe_avg_depth, 2), " ft"),
color = "blue", hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0) +
labs(
title = "John Doe: Strike Rate by Catcher Depth",
subtitle = "Percent of non-swing pitches called strikes at each depth",
x = "Catcher Depth (c_y)",
y = "Strike Rate"
) +
scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
ylim(0, max(john_doe_strike_rate$strike_rate, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15)

# ================================================================
# STEP 6: STRIKE RATE VS EXPECTED STRIKE RATE
# ================================================================

john_doe_strike_compare <- john_doe_non_swing %>%
  filter(!is.na(c_y), !is.na(is_strike), !is.na(expected_strike)) %>%
  filter(c_y >= depth_p05, c_y <= depth_p95) %>%
  mutate(
    depth_bin = floor(c_y / 0.1) * 0.1,
    is_strike = as.logical(is_strike)
  ) %>%
  group_by(depth_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pitches = n(),
    actual_strike_rate = mean(is_strike, na.rm = TRUE),
    expected_strike_rate = mean(expected_strike, na.rm = TRUE),
    diff = actual_strike_rate - expected_strike_rate,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_pitches >= 15)

# --- Plot actual vs expected strike rates ---
ggplot(john_doe_strike_compare, aes(x = depth_bin)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = expected_strike_rate, color = "Expected"), linewidth = 1.1, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = actual_strike_rate, color = "Actual"), linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = john_doe_optimal$depth_bin, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = john_doe_avg_depth, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "John Doe: Actual vs Expected Strike Rate by Catcher Depth",
    subtitle = "Dashed line = Expected | Solid line = Actual | Red = Optimal | Blue = Average",
    x = "Catcher Depth (c_y)",
    y = "Strike Rate",
    color = "Rate Type"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "darkorange", "Expected" = "gray40")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

john_doe_strike_diff_table <- john_doe_strike_compare %>%
  select(
    depth_bin,
    actual_strike_rate,
    expected_strike_rate,
    diff
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(diff)) 

print(
  john_doe_strike_diff_table %>%
    mutate(
      actual_strike_rate = scales::percent(actual_strike_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
      expected_strike_rate = scales::percent(expected_strike_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
      diff = scales::percent(diff, accuracy = 0.1)
    ),
  n = Inf
)
```
